backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the wedding invitation platform, defining data types (Invitation, Event, RSVP, Photo, Music) and CRUD operations with access control, blob storage, and invite link mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single feature (restoring all frontend files to Version 5 state) to its affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every page and component.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, dashboard, create, edit, invitation), wrapping protected routes in AuthGuard and InvitationFormProvider.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGuard.t: Authentication guard component that blocks access to protected routes, showing a login prompt if unauthenticated and automatically assigning the user role upon first login.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/RSVPRe: A modal component that displays RSVP responses and statistics (total responses, confirmed guests, declined) for a given invitation, fetching data via custom hooks and rendering a scrollable list of guest responses.
frontend/src/components/events/EventCard: A display card component for a single event that shows event type icon, title, date, time, venue, and description, with edit and delete action buttons.
frontend/src/components/events/EventForm: A form component for creating or editing an event, allowing the user to select event type and fill in title, date, time, venue, and description fields.
frontend/src/components/guest/CountdownT: A live countdown timer component that displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds until the wedding date, styled according to the invitation's template and dark/light mode.
frontend/src/components/guest/CoupleIntr: A section component that introduces the couple with their photos and names side by side, using intersection observer for scroll-based fade-in animation and adapting styles for dark or light themes.
frontend/src/components/guest/EventTimel: A timeline component that renders a list of wedding events (haldi, mehndi, sangeet, etc.) as styled cards with gradient headers, icons, and scroll-triggered animations based on the invitation's template.
frontend/src/components/guest/HeroSectio: Renders the full-screen hero section of a wedding invitation with a parallax background, optional couple photos, names, date, and venue.
frontend/src/components/guest/PhotoGalle: Displays a responsive photo grid for a wedding invitation and opens selected photos in a fullscreen lightbox with prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/guest/RSVPForm.t: Provides a styled RSVP form for wedding guests to submit attendance, guest count, and a message, with a confirmation state after submission.
frontend/src/components/guest/VenueSecti: Renders an animated venue section showing the wedding venue name, address, and navigation links, styled according to the invitation template.
frontend/src/components/guest/WhatsAppSh: A fixed floating button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp share link for the wedding invitation URL.
frontend/src/components/layout/Decorativ: Renders a decorative horizontal divider in one of three variants—mandala, flourish, or simple line—using gold-themed styling.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Fixed site header with logo, navigation links, create button, and Internet Identity login/logout, with scroll-aware styling and a mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicContr: A fixed floating music player component that supports play/pause, mute, and volume control for a given audio URL, with autoplay support and an expandable controls panel.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicUploa: A form component for uploading an audio file (MP3/WAV/M4A) to the invitation, with preview playback and an autoplay toggle stored in the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/media/PhotoGalle: A drag-and-drop/click photo upload component that reads image files as data URLs and stores them in the invitation form context, displaying a deletable grid of uploaded photos.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Reusable skeleton loading component supporting four variants (card, text, image, invitation-card) with configurable item count for loading state UI.
frontend/src/components/templates/ColorS: A grid picker component that displays available color schemes from template definitions and updates the selected color scheme in the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/templates/FontSe: Defines a list of heading/body font pairings grouped by category and renders a grouped selector UI for choosing a font combination for the invitation.
frontend/src/components/templates/Templa: Renders a live styled preview card of the wedding invitation using the current form data, resolving color scheme, font choice, and background style to display names, date, and venue.
Displays available invitation templates grouped by category in a grid, allowing the user to select a template which is saved to the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/wizard/CoupleDet: Wizard step component for entering bride/groom names, wedding date, and uploading circular profile photos with preview and remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/wizard/EventMana: Wizard step for managing wedding events (add, edit, delete), displaying them as sorted cards with an inline EventForm and optional back/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/wizard/MediaMana: Wizard step that combines PhotoGalleryUpload and MusicUploader components for managing invitation media, with optional back/next navigation buttons.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ProgressB: Displays a multi-step progress bar with numbered circles connected by a gold gradient line, highlighting completed, current, and upcoming steps.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ReviewSte: Final wizard step showing a summary of all form data (couple details, events, template, media) and a slug input field before submitting to create the invitation.
frontend/src/components/wizard/TemplateT: Wizard step for selecting and customizing the invitation template, color scheme, font, and background style, with support for saving and applying named theme variants.
frontend/src/context/InvitationFormConte: React context providing global form state for the invitation wizard, including CRUD operations for events and helpers to update or reset all form fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, invitations, events, RSVPs, photos, music, and themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Provides two hooks—useScrollAnimation for triggering visibility state when an element enters the viewport, and useLazyLoad for deferring image loading until the image is near the viewport.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a comprehensive CSS custom property design system with gold, crimson, ivory, and charcoal palettes for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitationWizar: A multi-step wizard page for creating a wedding invitation, sequentially collecting couple details, events, template/theme, and media, then submitting all data to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page that lists all user-created wedding invitations with actions to create, edit, preview, delete, publish, copy the link, and view RSVP responses.
frontend/src/pages/GuestInvitation.tsx: Public-facing wedding invitation page that fetches invitation data by slug and renders all guest-facing sections (hero, countdown, couple intro, events, photo gallery, venue, RSVP) with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/InvitationEditor.tsx: Authenticated editor page for managing an existing invitation, providing tabbed UI to update details, template/theme, events, photos, and background music via mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing features, a how-it-works section, and CTAs to navigate to the dashboard or start creating an invitation.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: 404 error page with a pulsing heart icon and navigation buttons to return home or go to the dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/animations.ts: Exports animation duration constants, easing curves, Framer Motion presets, and helper functions for stagger delays and scroll-triggered CSS transition styles.
frontend/src/utils/eventIcons.tsx: Provides a getEventConfig function and EVENT_CONFIGS map that return icon, color, and gradient configuration objects for each Indian wedding event type (Haldi, Mehndi, Sangeet, Wedding, Reception, Custom).
frontend/src/utils/templateDefinitions.t: Defines the TemplateDefinition interface and exports a TEMPLATES array containing color, font, and gradient configuration for all available wedding invitation templates across categories like Royal Indian, Modern Minimal, Cinematic Dark, and Romantic.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a wedding-themed design system with luxury color palettes (gold, crimson, ivory, charcoal), custom fonts, shadows, and dark mode support.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a Wedding Invitations app, tracking a rollback request to restore both frontend and backend to their Version 5 state after a breaking deployment.
